title: verify-build findings buffer
description: Schema for the structured findings buffer written by /flow:verify-build Step 8. Consumed by /flow:ship Step 4a (FB-XXXX synthesis) and by the future HTML case-study renderer (PR R candidate). Shape is a superset of what each consumer needs so neither needs a schema migration.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking changes; never on additive changes.

branch.description: Git branch the verify pass ran against (`git branch --show-current`).

head_sha_short.description: Short SHA of HEAD at verify time (`git rev-parse --short HEAD`).

plugin_version.description: Version of the flow plugin that produced this buffer (read from plugin.json).

platform_hint.description: Project platform as resolved by bundled /run; informs which not-tested checklist to use. 'unknown' when /run autodetect was ambiguous.

verify_budget_calls_used.description: Tool-call count consumed by bundled /verify during Step 5. Compared against flow.config.json.verifyBudgetCalls.

verify_budget_overrun.description: True if budget cap fired and all unjudged verdicts were forced to Unknown.

spike_mode.description: True if invoked with --spike or no plan was found.

overall_verdict.description: Aggregated verdict per Step 7. Any FAIL or any Unknown across dimensions/criteria aggregates here.

exit_code.description: 0 for PASS; 1 for FAIL or Unknown. Pins the gate-blocking contract.

criteria.description: One entry per criterion extracted from the plan (or per spike-rubric check in spike mode).

text.description: Verbatim criterion text from the plan's **Spec-walk:** block (or spike-rubric check name).

adversarial_cases.description: 0-2 adversarial cases per adversarial.md output. Empty array when criterion is fully covered by its text.

observations.description: Discrete observation captures from bundled /verify, classified by type. Empty array when criterion was not exercised.

type.description: Observation discriminator. 'narrative' captures freeform /verify prose; the others are structured captures the HTML renderer can lay out distinctly.

content.description: The captured content. For 'screenshot' this is a relative path or base64 data URI; for 'a11y_snapshot' it's the snapshot text; for 'network' it's the request/response summary; for 'console'/'log'/'stdout' it's the log line; for 'narrative' it's the prose excerpt.

timestamp_offset_ms.description: Optional milliseconds since verify start; helps HTML renderer order observations along a timeline.

aggregated_verdict.description: Per-criterion aggregation. PASS only if all three dimensions PASS. Any FAIL or Unknown propagates.

not_tested.description: Closed-form per-platform checklist from lib/not-tested-checklist.md. Agent flips tested=true only where it actually exercised the surface.

tested.description: True only when the agent actually exercised this surface.

rationale.description: Optional one-sentence rationale, primarily for the false case.

evidence.description: Exactly two verbatim quotes per the two-citation rule. First quote is from /verify observations; second is from the criterion / adversarial case / plan rule.

notes.description: One-sentence rationale for FAIL or Unknown. Empty string for PASS.
